summary: Plan-only PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected; no GitHub mutations, merges, fixes, or closeouts are planned. Hydrated refs with live state were classified conservatively as independent inventory items unless a specific unresolved review decision remains. Refs omitted from the compacted preflight artifact are kept non-mutating and use the job inventory PR timestamp only to satisfy deterministic target_updated_at validation; no mutating action depends on those timestamps.
